About Cape Cod Makers

A community makerspace serving Cape Cod and the Islands.

Our Mission

Cape Cod Makers provides a shared workspace where community members can access professional tools, learn new skills, and collaborate on projects. We believe that making things is fundamental to human creativity and innovation.

We are committed to keeping our space affordable and welcoming to makers of all skill levels, from complete beginners to seasoned professionals.

Our Story

Cape Cod Makers was founded by a group of local enthusiasts who wanted to bring the makerspace movement to Cape Cod. What started as a small gathering of tinkerers has grown into a thriving community with a dedicated workshop space.

Today, our members include woodworkers, electronics hobbyists, artists, engineers, students, and curious people from all walks of life.

Find Us

Cape Cod Makers 204 Sisson Road
Harwich, MA 02645

info@capecodmakers.org

Get Directions

Come See for Yourself

The best way to learn about us is to visit. Come to an open house and see our space, meet our members, and ask your questions.
